next_steps: Collect stool for Clostridium botulinum culture and toxin assay (priority 1)
Consult local public health authority for urgent release of BabyBIG (botulism immune globulin)
Perform repetitive nerve stimulation (EMG/NCS) to identify characteristic pre-synaptic neuromuscular blockade
Maintain strict pulmonary support and hemodynamic monitoring
Avoid magnesium-containing medications and aminoglycosides that potentiate neuromuscular block
Obtain stool specimen for botulinum toxin and perform a comprehensive environmental and dietary history review
